findings.message: Duplicate data-access layer: both db/item_service.py and db/repository.py provide overlapping data access functions (add_item/fetch_all_items vs create_item/list_items). Routes should depend on a single canonical data access module.
findings.suggestion: Consolidate db/repository.py and db/item_service.py into a single data access layer. Choose one module and remove the duplicate.

findings.message: Session transaction management (commit/refresh) leaked into route handler. This couples the route to SQLAlchemy implementation details and duplicates logic that should be encapsulated in the data access layer.
findings.suggestion: Move session.commit() and session.refresh() into the add_item() function in the data access layer so the route handler only calls the business logic function.
